credibility_reasons: All three external baselines completed 389/389 materialized items with zero failed items.
Code confirms full_eval output phase and iterates manifest items with runner.run_item; smoke reports only gate entry.
Visual examples were generated from full eval outputs.
highres_rerun_note: Not required for the corrected claim boundary; only consider a small optional high-res sanity if claiming external SOTA, which is forbidden by current results.
main_claim_rewrite: STWM is not a universal VOS/point-tracking replacement; it is a trace-conditioned belief association mechanism that improves internal baselines and provides complementary advantages in continuity-heavy reacquisition cases while strong foundation/video trackers such as SAM2 remain stronger overall.
more_data_note: 389 items are enough for the external diagnostic/placement update. Do not continue infinite baseline expansion just because SAM2 is strong.
strengthened_claim: They strengthen a narrower claim: STWM has complementary continuity-heavy trace-belief advantages, especially vs CoTracker on occlusion and long-gap.
weakened_claim: They rule out an overall external-SOTA claim because SAM2 and CoTracker beat STWM overall.
